meta.title: Privacy Policy | TNP
meta.description: TNP Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heroSubtitle: We build floors and furniture, not user profiles. Here is exactly what we collect, why, and how to make us delete it.
privacy.intro: TNP (Lô 35 đường số 9, Khu Công Nghiệp Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam) is committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.claim: One form. A handful of fields. Nothing tracked in the background.
collect.body: When you submit our contact form, we collect your name, email address, phone number (optional), and project details. We use this information solely to respond to your enquiry and provide a quote. We do not collect data automatically through cookies beyond a single functional preference cookie.

use.title: How we use your data
use.claim: Your details get you a quote — never a marketing list.
use.body: Your contact details are used to: respond to your project enquiry, prepare and send a quote, and follow up if you have not received a response. We do not use your data for unsolicited marketing. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties except where required by law.

storage.title: Data storage
storage.claim: We keep only what we need, for only as long as we need it.
storage.body: Contact form submissions are processed via Formspree (formspree.io), a third-party form service. Formspree's privacy policy governs data processed through their platform. We retain your enquiry details for as long as necessary to fulfil your request or as required by applicable law.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.claim: No trackers. No ad pixels. No analytics scripts — period.
cookies.body: This website uses a single functional cookie to remember your privacy banner acceptance. No tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or analytics scripts are used. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking services.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.claim: Ask us to delete your data, and we will — within 30 days.
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at thuy@tnpgr.vn. We will respond within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.claim: A real factory, a real address, a real person who answers.
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, reach TNP at thuy@tnpgr.vn or +84 90 333 37 29. Address: Lô 35 đường số 9, Khu Công Nghiệp Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam.

hero.title: Solid wood flooring, doors & stairs.
hero.subtitle: TNP is a Japanese family-owned manufacturer with over 25 years of production in Biên Hòa. We make solid wood flooring, interior and exterior doors, folding and sliding doors, and stairs — in our own 9,950 m² factory with six kiln-drying rooms. One factory. One standard.
hero.imageAlt: TNP Hinoki solid wood flooring installed in a modern living room — warm grain, Japanese-owned Vietnamese craftsmanship

about.ariaLabel: About TNP — Japanese family-owned solid wood manufacturer
about.title: Japanese ownership. Vietnamese craftsmanship. Since 1997.
about.narrative:
TNP was founded in Biên Hòa, Vietnam in 1997 by a Japanese family whose commitment to timber craftsmanship runs generations deep. For more than 25 years, we have manufactured solid wood flooring, solid wood doors — interior, exterior entrance, folding, and sliding — and stairs entirely within our own factory. We don't outsource. We don't cut corners.

Our facility speaks for itself: 9,950 m² of land, 5,700 m² of production space, an in-house sawmill processing logs sourced directly from Japan and Europe, and six dedicated kiln-drying rooms that bring every board to a precise 8–10% moisture content — the threshold for long-term dimensional stability.

The materials we work with are the ones serious builders trust. Our signature timbers are Hinoki (Japanese cypress, 檜) and Keyaki (Japanese zelkova, 欅) — both established brand names in Japan's premium timber market — complemented by Oak, Acacia, Ash, Black Walnut, Pine, Cedar, and Sugi (Japanese cedar, 杉). For the North American market, we import American red alder and manufacture knotty alder doors exported to the USA. Our laminated freeboard has shipped continuously to Japan and Korea for over 20 years.

We work directly with renovators, contractors, builders, and architects — from single-room flooring projects to large-scale commercial fits. OEM and bespoke orders are welcome.

statement.sub: Every board, every door, every stair — made under one roof in Biên Hòa, from logs we mill ourselves, in rooms we dry ourselves.

process.title: From raw timber to finished space
process.leadIn: Every TNP project follows three stages. Whether you need Hinoki flooring for a home in Tokyo, knotty alder doors for a project in the USA, or a complete interior for a home in Saigon — the process is the same.

creation.label: Creation
creation.title: We source, design, and build it
creation.text: It starts with your brief. Flooring, doors, stairs — or all three? What species and finish? We source logs from Japan and Europe, mill them in-house, and kiln-dry to 8–10% moisture content. Our DOUBLE LOCK door construction uses a rectangular block joining rails and stiles with two dowels from the top — preventing splitting from humidity and temperature changes. Every piece passes quality inspection before it ships.
creation.imageAlt: TNP factory — solid wood being precision-milled in the 9,950 m² Biên Hòa workshop

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.title: We ship it to you — anywhere
delivery.text: When your order is ready, our logistics team packages, palletizes, and ships — domestically across Vietnam or internationally to Japan, Korea, the USA, and beyond. We've been exporting to Japan and Korea for over 20 years. Export orders include containerization, freight coordination, and all necessary documentation.
delivery.imageAlt: Palletized solid wood flooring planks export-packaged and ready for international shipment

installation.label: Installation
installation.title: We install it perfectly
installation.text: For domestic clients, our crew handles everything on-site: subfloor preparation and flooring installation, door fitting and hardware, stair assembly, leveling, and anchoring. For export and international clients, we provide detailed installation guides, technical specs, and remote support. Before we consider any project done, we confirm you're satisfied.
installation.imageAlt: TNP technician installing solid wood flooring — professional installation in a Vietnamese home

statement.sub: Sourcing, kiln-drying, manufacturing, delivery, installation — quoted together, never piecemeal.

flooring.name: Solid Wood Flooring & Stairs
flooring.description: Solid wood flooring and stairs in Hinoki (Japanese cypress), Keyaki (Japanese elm), Sugi (Japanese cedar), Oak, Acacia, Ash, Black Walnut, and more. Kiln-dried to 8–10% moisture content, precision-milled and finished in our Biên Hòa factory. Finishes: brushed line, oil, UV. Available in AB-grade clear and rustic. Our Rustic Oak and Hinoki flooring are trusted brand names in Japan.
flooring.examples: Apartment flooring · Commercial spaces · Renovation reflooring · Stairs

furniture.name: Solid Wood Doors & Furniture
furniture.tagline: Interior, exterior, folding & sliding doors — DOUBLE LOCK construction
furniture.description: Four door types: interior doors, exterior entrance doors, folding doors, and sliding doors. All built with TNP's DOUBLE LOCK construction — a rectangular block joining rails and stiles with two dowels from the top, preventing splitting from humidity and temperature changes. Rubber-edged panel gaps allow natural wood movement. We also manufacture bespoke timber furniture and export knotty alder doors to the USA.
furniture.examples: Interior doors · Exterior entrance doors · Folding & sliding doors · Custom furniture · Knotty alder (USA export)

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting your project.

q1.question: What is the DOUBLE LOCK door construction?
q1.answer: TNP uses a Rectangular Block to join door rails and stiles. Two dowels are inserted from the top, passing through the inner block of both rail and stile. This DOUBLE LOCK construction prevents the splitting that often occurs when wood is exposed to changes in humidity and temperature. The center panel edges are also designed with rubber-filled gaps, allowing the wood to naturally expand and contract with moisture changes — so the door performs reliably for decades.

q2.question: What timber species do you work with?
q2.answer: Our signature materials are Hinoki (Japanese cypress, 檜 / ヒノキ) and Keyaki (Japanese elm/zelkova, 欅 / ケヤキ) — both trusted names in Japan. We also work with Japanese Cedar (Sugi), Oak, Acacia, Ash, Black Walnut, Pine, Cedar, and Cypress for flooring and stairs. For our USA door export line, we import American red alder and produce knotty alder doors. We source logs from Japan, Europe, and the USA.

q3.question: How long does TNP take on a project?
q3.answer: Flooring orders typically take 3–5 weeks from confirmation to delivery. Door orders take 4–8 weeks depending on quantity and species. Full-space projects combining flooring, doors, and stairs take 8–12 weeks. We confirm your timeline before any work begins.

q4.question: Do you export internationally?
q4.answer: Yes. TNP has exported to Japan and Korea for over 20 years, primarily laminated freeboard and Hinoki flooring. We export knotty alder doors to the USA. We also serve other international markets. Export orders include containerization, freight coordination, and all necessary documentation.

q5.question: What flooring finishes do you offer?
q5.answer: We offer three finishes: brushed line, oil, and UV. These are available across our full range of species — Hinoki, Keyaki, Oak, Acacia, Ash, and Black Walnut. Flooring comes in both clear AB-grade and rustic treatments. Our Rustic Oak and Hinoki flooring ranges have become established brand names in Japan.

q6.question: Is installation included?
q6.answer: For domestic clients in Vietnam — yes. Our crew handles flooring installation (subfloor prep, laying, finishing), door fitting and hardware, and stair assembly on-site. For international clients, we provide detailed installation guides and remote technical support.

q7.question: Can I visit your factory?
q7.answer: Absolutely. Our 9,950 m² facility is in Tam Phước Industrial Zone, Biên Hòa — about an hour from Ho Chi Minh City. You'll see our in-house sawmill, six kiln-drying rooms, and the full production line. Contact us to arrange a visit.
